dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal captures Falling Rising Volume (price up + volume down) as entry_long and Falling Falling Volume (price down + volume down) as entry_short. Both indicate weak moves prone to reversal. Exit conditions use reversal of price direction as the author provided no explicit exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT). Hold period set to 1 week (7 days) per timeframe_for_reversal parameter.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal captures Falling Rising Volume (price up + volume down) as entry_long and Falling Falling Volume (price down + volume down) as entry_short. Both indicate weak moves prone to reversal. Exit conditions use reversal of price direction as the author provided no explicit exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT). Hold period set to 1 week (7 days) per timeframe_for_reversal parameter.

source_rule_text: When price rallies or pulls back accompanied by declining volume, expect a reversal in direction because weak volume indicates lack of support for the price move.
